Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xA3CB "RENEGADE-E480-A3CB" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $e480 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Renegade.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Moved the last part of the original loading routine from $0161 to $E480 so that the dump can start at $0400. This routine sets up the VICII settings, disables all interrupts and copies 512 bytes of data from $EC00 down to $0200. It then jumps to the entry point at $A3CB (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code).
The loading screen is from the Spectrum version.
